title: Golden Bread Delights
description: A mod that adds enchanted golden bread to the game
body:
🥖 **Golden Bread**
This is the initial, significantly improved version of regular bread.

_Crafting:_ Combine Bread with Gold Nuggets on a crafting table.

_Effect:_ Gold Bread restores substantially more hunger and saturation than its standard counterpart. It's ideal for quickly replenishing energy supplies while exploring or working.

✨ **Enchanted Golden Bread** is a true survival asset, Enchanted Gold Bread elevates ordinary food to the level of a mystical artifact.

_Crafting:_ Combine Gold Bread with Gold Ingots on a crafting table.

_Effect:_ In addition to fully restoring hunger, the enchanted bread grants beneficial temporary effects (buffs) similar to enchanted golden apple.

This item will be your reliable companion in the most dangerous adventures, offering rapid healing and protection!


My YT: https://www.youtube.com/@Sh4døw_YT333
